name: idempotency
description: Idempotency in this app ensures repeated POST requests with the same Idempotency-Key do not create duplicate transfers. The service records the first request payload and transaction ID, then reuses the result for identical retries while rejecting the same key with different data. This prevents repeated money transfers. It avoids duplicate charge.

name: Java-SpringBoot-Apigateway-and-Load-Balancer-with-Client
description: Java Spring Boot project with API Gateway and Load Balancer for microservices. Uses @EnableDiscoveryClient with spring-cloud-starter-netflix-eureka-client for service registration and @EnableEurekaServer with spring-cloud-starter-netflix-eureka-server for service discovery, enabling scalable, resilient, and load-balanced client-servicecommunication

name: Java-SpringBoot-Cognito-Implementation
description: Java Spring Boot project implementing AWS Cognito for user authentication and authorization. Supports secure signup, login, token-based authentication (JWT), and role-based access control. Integrates with RESTful APIs, ensuring secure, scalable, and maintainable microservices authentication and user management.

name: Java-SpringBoot-Microservices
description: Java Spring Boot microservices project with RESTful APIs, inter-service communication via RestTemplate, input validation, and scheduled tasks. Includes unit testing with JUnit and Mockito for controllers, services, and RestTemplate calls, ensuring a modular, scalable, and reliable microservice architecture.

name: Java-SpringBoot-Spring-Security
description: Java Spring Boot project implementing Spring Security for authentication and authorization. Supports secure user login, role-based access control, password encryption, and JWT token-based authentication. Ensures secure RESTful APIs, protecting endpoints while providing scalable, maintainable, and robust security for microservices.

name: LibraryManagement_JavaAndAngular
description: Creating a Library Management using Java as Backend (Server-side) and Angular as Frontend (Client-side)-(REST API)

name: Spring-Boot-Gradle-Embedded-System
description: This Spring Boot Gradle project has two modules: an API application handling the business layer and a data module managing database access. The data module is embedded into the API app as a dependency, enabling clean separation of concerns. It uses Spring Data JPA with MySQL and Lombok for efficient development.

name: Spring-StudentManagement
description: Using Spring to Create a Student Management - Spring Web = to build web etc., Spring Data JPA =Persist data in SQL stores, MySQL Driver = to connect to Msql, Thymeleaf = Allows HTML to be correctly displayed in browsers, and Spring Boot DevTools to provide last restart or reload

name: SpringBatch-ImportCsv-DownloadCsv
description: A Spring Batch application that imports data from a CSV file, processes it, and allows downloading the processed data as a CSV. Demonstrates reading, writing, and transforming CSV data using Spring Boot and Spring Batch for efficient batch processing workflows.

name: SpringBatchWithDirectoryWatcher
description: Spring Boot app with Spring Batch and a directory watcher. Monitors a folder for file changes and triggers batch jobs automatically on new file uploads. Uses Java WatchService and Spring annotations for clean, event-driven processing. Ideal for file-based ETL or automation tasks.

name: SpringBootProject
description: A complete Spring Boot project featuring AOP for cross-cutting concerns, a layered architecture with service and controller components, global error handling, DTO-based input validation, and unit testing with JUnit/Mockito. Designed following best practices for clean and maintainable code.

name: SpringBootWithSeleniumJunit
description: A Spring Boot project integrated with Selenium WebDriver and JUnit for automated UI testing. Supports end-to-end test execution within a structured, maintainable framework. Ideal for testing web apps with a clean Java-based setup.

name: Spring Boot JWT Authentication & Authorization (RBAC + Scopes)
description: Spring Boot JWT Authentication & Authorization (RBAC + Scopes) is a self-contained demo application that showcases secure user authentication, role-based access control, and fine-grained scope-based authorization using Spring Boot 3, Spring Security 6, and JWTs.
